programmes.show_description: Apartheid drama with Stephen Dorff. An English youngster is shocked by the brutal racism endemic in his South African school, and vows to do everything he can to fight for justice. (1992)

Slithering scares from Hammer. A couple move to a Cornish village where it becomes apparent that locals are being killed by a snake-like creature and their neighbour harbours a terrible secret. (1966)
Legend returns soon.
Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. A geneticist is kidnapped by a group wanting to use her research to create a race of genetically superior soldiers. S5, Ep20
The team is locked up in Fort Owen to await court martial for the murder of Colonel Morrison, but the prosecutor representing the army has a surprise witness. S5, Ep2
Vincent learns that an old army friend is accused of murder and suspects that the supposed victim was an Invader - but that defence won't hold up in court!
Fantastical prehistoric adventure inspired by Edgar Rice Burroughs' literary classic. A newlywed couple on a romantic cruise stumble upon an island overrun by ancient malevolent creatures. (2009)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Western remake with Lou Diamond Phillips. A notorious outlaw contemplates changing his ways when he takes shelter with a Quaker family, but must protect them when an old foe hunts him down. (2009)
Western with Sean Connery. A party of European aristocrats on a hunting expedition in New Mexico falls foul of marauding Apaches and a treacherous guide. (1968)
The crew answer a distress call from a nearby planet, but on arrival are puzzled to find children playing happily beside their parents' bodies. S3, Ep4/24
An Invader courier takes delivery of a briefcase full of alien spores, but is soon involved in an accident that draws Vincent's attention. Guest starring Gene Hackman.
As the team face a firing squad, General Stockwell drives a hard bargain in return for giving the nod to a rescue attempt. S5, Ep3
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Trivette's old girlfriend get his help to locate her father, and then kills him. S5, Ep21
Sci-fi thriller with Jason Statham. A crooked prison warden coerces a falsely imprisoned convict into taking part in a high-octane race where convicts battle to the death in customised cars. (2008)
Action drama with Danny Trejo. A Mexican mercenary is hired to assassinate a politician, but when his employers betray him, he teams up with militant illegal immigrants to seek bloody revenge. (2010)
Gripping action thriller with Sam Worthington. When a troubled assassin hired to kill a young woman can't bring himself to pull the trigger, he chooses to protect her from her enemies instead. (2017)
Crime thriller with Adrien Brody. A trio of career criminals find themselves trapped in a warehouse with the police closing in, not realising that an even greater threat lurks inside. (2017)
Legend returns soon.

The Asylum meets Arthur Conan Doyle! Holmes and Watson are on the trail of a criminal and scientific mastermind who seems to control monsters and creations that are beyond belief. (2010)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
When a hotel owner believes he is being watched by aliens and commits suicide, the Invaders take over the hotel - giving them access to a special guest.
After an alien kills a doctor in front of his wife, the extent of the alien invasion is revealed to a small town, making the residents a target for the Invaders.
When an alien saucer crashes into a hillside, a ranch woman cares for an Invader survivor. Vincent soon hears of the crash and investigates.
Vincent learns that an old army friend is accused of murder and suspects that the supposed victim was an Invader - but that defence won't hold up in court!
An Invader courier takes delivery of a briefcase full of alien spores, but is soon involved in an accident that draws Vincent's attention. Guest starring Gene Hackman.
Sci-fi adventure with Lionel Jeffries. An eccentric Victorian inventor builds the world's first spaceship for an expedition to the moon, where giant insects roam. (1964)

Nautical drama with Adam Baldwin. Disaster strikes at sea when a luxury liner is capsized by a terrorist bomb, uniting a group of strangers in a struggle to survive.  S1, Ep1(2005)
Nautical drama with Adam Baldwin. Disaster strikes at sea when a luxury liner is capsized by a terrorist bomb, uniting a group of strangers in a struggle to survive.  S1, Ep2(2005)

Bookmaker Max Phillips learns that his son is dying in Vietnam, and risks everything to save him. S5, Ep1
It is 2040. Boxing has been outlawed and is performed by androids, but one of the last human fighters has faith in a battered fighting robot. S5, Ep2
Remake of the 1976 action thriller, with Ethan Hawke. A sergeant must protect cops and prisoners when his station is besieged by a corrupt policeman and his crew on New Year's Eve. (2005)
Tense thriller with Sam Worthington. An escaped convict threatens to jump from a skyscraper, while his brother takes advantage of the ensuing chaos to carry out a plan of his own. (2012)
